## Meeting Purpose

Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.

## Key Takeaways

  - [New leaderboard CTA image designed and approved for use in content](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - SEO performance showing positive trends, with high average position (3.9) for agent-related content
  - Content pipeline experiencing delays due to internal Galileo priorities; 9 pieces in progress, 3 delivered
  - Product naming changes coming soon; Observe and Evaluate to be merged

## Topics

### Leaderboard CTA Image Design

  - [Collaboratively designed a new CTA image for the agent leaderboard](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Opted for a text-heavy design over chart visualization for clarity](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Final version: "Where to start when building agents? Check out the Agent Leaderboard"](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Image to be exported and used in content](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Content Pipeline and SEO Performance

  - [9 pieces in progress, 3 delivered, 3 more expected by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Technical SEO audit paused due to existing backlog of fixes](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Impressions plateauing after recent all-time high, expected due to reduced new content](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [CTR showing improvement](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [Strong performance for agent-related content (avg. position 3.9)](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [LLM eval content averaging position 14, room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Podcast content (6 articles) indexed immediately, 4 more pending](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### Product Naming Changes

  - [Galileo planning to consolidate product names](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Observe and Evaluate to be merged into single offering](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Changes part of upcoming PLG version, beta expected in March](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Protect likely to remain separate product](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Refreshing high-performing agent-related blog post](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Updating older, well-performing posts to maximize value](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Considering embedding YouTube videos for podcast episodes in Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Prioritizing SEO-focused content over podcast article catch-up (1-2 podcast articles per week)](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

### Podcast Promotion

  - [No separate email list for podcast currently](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Occasional one-off email blasts for new episodes](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Potential for semi-automated regular cadence in future](https://fathom.video/share/z14noUoxEq5uNmeXz54rXWSMuz8tiZu9?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

## Next Steps

  - Export and implement new leaderboard CTA image in content
  - Continue refreshing and updating high-performing content
  - Embed YouTube videos for podcast episodes in Sanity CMS
  - Prioritize SEO-focused content while maintaining 1-2 podcast articles per week
  - Consider strategies for semi-automating podcast email promotions
